_note: deployment-configured.yaml mounts hello-dcs-config AND references hello-dcs-secret (API_TOKEN secretKeyRef), so the secret must exist BEFORE the deploy or pods never start. The content teaches configmap and secret on separate pages; the smoke plan applies the secret early so the single deploy comes up. The 'roll out a change' page edits the greeting in the editor (Hello from DCS -> Hello from DCS PROD); the plan replicates that edit with sed. Deploys use envsubst for ${DCS_REGISTRY}.

steps.run: envsubst < ~/exercises/deployment-configured.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
sed 's/Hello from DCS/Hello from DCS PROD/g' ~/exercises/configmap.yaml | oc apply -f - && oc rollout restart deployment/hello-dcs && oc rollout status deployment/hello-dcs --timeout=180s
